channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: French nationals return home following Iran prison release
item.description: Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris were freed in November after more than three years at Evin prison.

item.title: Iraqi armed group releases abducted US journalist Shelly Kittleson
item.description: The armed group Kataib Hezbollah said that it would free Kittleson on the condition that she leave Iraq immediately.

item.title: Tehran synagogue destroyed as US-Israeli strikes kill over a dozen
item.description: A synagogue in Tehran was struck in a wave of US-Israeli attacks overnight.

item.title: Why JD Vance joined Pakistan’s last-ditch US-Iran mediation efforts
item.description: Backchannel talks gain pace as Pakistan mediates and Iran seeks indirect engagement through US vice president.

item.title: Top university says US-Israel attack targeted Iran’s progress, AI learning
item.description: Iran condemns systematic attacks on civilian sites, including academic hubs, as war devastates critical infrastructure.

item.title: US denies nuclear plan as deadline on threat to Iran ‘civilisation’ looms
item.description: Trump's threat to kill 'whole civilization' and comments from VP have raised fears.

item.title: Netanyahu: Israel shifting ‘balance of power’ with Iran strikes
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says Israel is intensifying strikes on Iran.

item.title: Russia confirms 16 Cameroonian soldiers killed in Ukraine war
item.description: No information has been provided specifying how the soldiers ended up fighting for Russia.

item.title: Fire erupts near industrial site in Saudi Arabia after Iranian strikes
item.description: A suspected Iranian missile attack sparked a huge fire near an industrial complex in Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Can Africa tackle the oil shock from the Iran war?
item.description: African nations are scrambling to secure oil and gas as the Iran war disrupts supplies from the Middle East.
